name: Festive Eggnog Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Vanilla pudding mix (not instant), 4 portion size
1/3 cup Pecans or walnuts, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the pudding and lemon jelly powder.
2. Gradually stir in water and lemon juice.
3. Cook over medium heat until boiling, then remove from heat.
4. Allow to cool until it becomes syrupy.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the raspberry jelly powder with boiling water until dissolved.
6. Add cranberry sauce, celery, and nuts to the mixture; chill until thickening stage.
7. Whip cream until stiff and fold into the thickened pudding and jelly mixture.
8. Fold in nutmeg.
9. Pour the mixture into a mold and refrigerate until firm.
10. Unmold on frilly lettuce, which highlights any table.
Note: This recipe contains no eggnog but tastes like eggnog. Yield: 4 servings.
